description: Uniswap V3 LP management API for Base + Robinhood Chain. Agent-friendly: pay per call with x402 USDC, no registration. Read pools, then get ready-to-sign transaction calldata (raw {chain,to,data,value}) for mint/decrease/collect/burn/close.

endpoints.name: bankrliq-pool-finder
endpoints.description: Find Uniswap V3 pools with live TVL, 24h volume (sampled from Swap logs), fees and APR. Pass token0+token1 for an exact pair, only token0 for a CA search (pairs it with WETH + the chain stable), or nothing for WETH/stable defaults.
endpoints.output: { chain, pools: [{ fee, address, tickSpacing, token0:{address,symbol,decimals}, token1:{...}, tick, liquidity, price0In1, price1In0, tvlUsd, vol24hUsd, fees24hUsd, aprEst, volNote }] }

endpoints.name: bankrliq-liq-action
endpoints.description: Prepare Uniswap V3 LP transactions. Returns txBlobs: [{ label, blob, raw }] — 'blob' is Bankr-native for confirmTransaction; 'raw' is { chain, to, data, value } calldata any agent can sign and submit with its own wallet. Actions: mint (approvals + mint, sign in order), decrease, collect, burn, close (decreaseLiquidity + collect [+ burn] as ONE multicall = one signature).

burn.description: close: burn the NFT at 100% (default true)

recipient.description: mint/collect/close: defaults to the paying wallet

endpoints.output: { action, chain, txBlobs: [{ label, blob, raw: { chain, to, data, value } }], ...preview fields } or { error }

notes: Transactions are prepared only — nothing is signed or broadcast server-side; the caller signs with its own wallet.
Approvals are exact-amount (no infinite approvals); mint/decrease minimums are slippage-protected; deadlines are 20 minutes.
